scripts.setup: npm install && npx playwright install chromium
scripts.cucumber:web:local:smoke: cross-env PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @smoke" && ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:local:sanity: cross-env PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @sanity" && ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:local:regression: cross-env PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @regression" && ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:demo:smoke: cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @smoke" && cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:demo:sanity: cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @sanity" && cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:demo:regression: cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp PWDEBUG=0 TIMEOUT_STEP=30000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=10000 NAV_TIMEOUT=30000 npx cucumber-js --tags "@automated and @regression" && cross-env BASE_URL=https://edoardoelh.github.io/Bank_MockUp ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
scripts.cucumber:web:debug: cross-env PWDEBUG=1 TIMEOUT_STEP=3600000 ACTION_TIMEOUT=0 NAV_TIMEOUT=0 npx cucumber-js --tags "@debug" && ts-node scripts/generate-report.ts && echo "Report generated at reports/html/index.html"
